'''ât-r-w-dh''' ('''katarwedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rumormonger|rumormonger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rumormonger|rumormonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-r-w-dh
|-
! Lemma
| katarwedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitarwedhoko|thitarwedhoko]] || [[word:jitarwedhoko|jitarwedhoko]] || [[word:shitarwedhoko|shitarwedhoko]] || [[word:kitarwedhoko|kitarwedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutarwedhoko|thuthutarwedhoko]] || [[word:jujutarwedhoko|jujutarwedhoko]] || [[word:shushutarwedhoko|shushutarwedhoko]] || [[word:kukutarwedhoko|kukutarwedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutarwedhoko|thutarwedhoko]] || [[word:jutarwedhoko|jutarwedhoko]] || [[word:shutarwedhoko|shutarwedhoko]] || [[word:kutarwedhoko|kutarwedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotarwedhoko|thotarwedhoko]] || [[word:jotarwedhoko|jotarwedhoko]] || [[word:shotarwedhoko|shotarwedhoko]] || [[word:kotarwedhoko|kotarwedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtarwedhoko|thĂŠtarwedhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtarwedhoko|jĂŠtarwedhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtarwedhoko|shĂŠtarwedhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtarwedhoko|kĂŠtarwedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatarwedhoko|thatarwedhoko]] || [[word:jatarwedhoko|jatarwedhoko]] || [[word:shatarwedhoko|shatarwedhoko]] || [[word:katarwedhoko|katarwedhoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
